headline: JD Vance 🥩🐸 Leads Iran PEACE POUNDTOWN 🇺🇸🇮🇷 in Pakistan! 💥✈️
text:
Hillbilly Elegy HUNK 🥩👨‍💼 JD VANCE 🐸📈 is DROPPING MIC 🎤💣 on Iran talks in PAKISTAN 🕌🚀 starting April 11th 🗓️🔥! White House SPINNER Karoline Leavitt 💅🗣️ spilling TEA ☕ that US MILITARY WON BIGLY 💥🏆 – Operation EPIC FURY 🤬⚡ SMASHED Iran's navy 🚢💥, drone swarms 🐝🚫 and missile DONGs 🚀🍆 into OBLIVION 😵💨! Ceasefire ceasefire baby 👶🕊️ opened the DOOR 🚪 for LONG-LASTING PEACE 🕊️💦 in the sandbox 🌍🏜️, but deets on proposals? MURKY AS HORMUZ FOG 🌫️🚢!

Iranian goons 🕌😡 were YELLING 'DESTROY' 💥⚔️ at ships trying to SLIDE thru STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🛥️🍑 – that vital CHOKER POINT 📍🔒 for OIL BABY 🛢️💰! But Leavitt's like 'PUBLIC LIES, PRIVATE SIMPS 🤫😏' – Tehran AGREED to UNBLOCK IT 🚫➡️✅ despite the salty threats 🧂🚫! Trump 🍊👑 posted TRUTH SOCIAL NUKES 💣📱 'WHOLE CIVILIZATION DIES 🪦🌍 unless DEAL or GTFO!' – critics WHINING 😭 about humanitarian oofies from US STRIKES 💥🏗️, but Leavitt claps back 'TRUMP HOLDS MORAL HIGH GROUND ⛰️😤 over ROGUE REGIME 🤡🇮🇷!' Tough talk = WINNING 🏆😩!

Vance 🥩🐸 teams with STEVE WITKOFF 🕴️💼 and JARED KUSHNER 💍🕶️ (Ivanka's hubba hubba 👰😍) for IN-PERSON NEGOTIATION ORGY 🤝💦 in Pakistan! Iran's '10-POINT WISH LIST' 🧞‍♂️📜? FAKE NEWS 🚫📰, initial prop was UNserious 😂🤡 – they MODIFIED it after Trump's CIVILIZATION NUKE THREAT ☢️🌋! 'Trump accepting Iranian SIMP LIST? ABSURD AF 🤣🙅‍♂️!' Leavitt ROASTS 🔥. Expect Strait OPENED QUICK N SAFE 🛥️🚀 – Trump holding 'em ACCOUNTABLE 👮‍♂️🔗 like a boss!

Meanwhile, Trump 🍊🐘 MEETS NATO BOSS Mark Rutte 🇳🇱🕴️ for FRANK TALK 💥🗣️ – alliance TENSE AF 😬🤝 cuz NATO FLAKED HARD 🚫🛡️ during Iran beatdown! 'NATO TESTED N FAILED 💔📉' quotes Trump's LETTER BOMB 📧💣. Trump FLOATING NATO EXIT 🚪✈️ after allies WHINED 'NOT OUR WAR 😩🙈' – ties back to GREENLAND GRAB 👋🧊🇬🇱 beef with Euro snowflakes ❄️😢! Leavitt: Trump's TOUGH DADDY STYLE 😤🍆 got us HERE – from HORMUZ HELL 🔥🚢 to PEACE POUNDING 💥🕊️! Vance crew SLAYING talks like hillbilly ninjas 🥩🥷 – Iran boutta BEND THE KNEE 🧎‍♂️🇮🇷! 🚀📈‼️
